title: Dashboard Readiness
objective: Verify OpenClaw can produce a usable dashboard URL and keep the gateway responsive after dashboard entry.

phases.title: Gateway Start
phases.intent: Start the gateway and classify readiness before dashboard checks.

phases.title: Dashboard Link
phases.intent: Use OpenClaw's dashboard command without opening a browser and require it to return promptly.

phases.title: Post-Dashboard Health
phases.intent: Verify dashboard entry did not make the gateway or websocket layer unstable.
